title: Cocoon pod
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:CocoonPod-EGtVV.jpg|thumb|150px|A cocoon pod containing an [[Mountain Terrain Armored Transport|MT-AT]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]].]]

'''Cocoon pods''' were transportation capsules used to distribute [[Mountain Terrain Armored Transport|MT-AT]] walkers, and most probably other vehicles as well. The pod contained a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] brain to help control its descent, and the walker—or whatever it was containing—would be encased in a protective gel-like substance. This method of deployment was similar to that of [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droids]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Champions of the Force]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 1996-03-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''
